description: Small deterministic suite for tool-flow smoke checks before any long signoff run.

vector_selection.name: zero_Ns4096_thr0
vector_selection.rationale: Confirms zero input stays zero through windowing, FFT/IFFT, WOLA, and final rounding.

vector_selection.name: impulse_Ns1024_thr0
vector_selection.rationale: Exercises startup, flush, delay alignment, and full-tail geometry.

vector_selection.name: near_threshold_multitone_Ns1024_thr64
vector_selection.rationale: Exercises threshold comparison and bin_stats plumbing on a short debug vector.

notes: This suite is intentionally not final signoff. It is for fast CI and workflow validation.
